notes: This policy authorizes continuous bounded 1000u forward evidence collection from reproducible contrarian forecast-failure hypotheses only. Historical S5 PF is immediate-entry hypothesis evidence, not proof of the passive LIMIT vehicle. Every vehicle+forecast-cycle signal is atomically claimed before POST; the fixed attached TP/SL is not modified by adaptive position paths. A loss forces six-hour backoff; three losses with cumulative negative net quarantine the stable selector/exit vehicle. Promotion requires all resolved forward exits with no duplicate-signal anomaly; this policy does not permit MARKET entries or relax spread/news/margin/guardian gates.
